baseline_note: heuristic baseline; no claim of state-of-the-art tuning
policy_agreement_note: ls_capacity_score_agreement_pct measures agreement with the CapacityScore winner at base workload (F4 for LS, F1 for TO). This is circular for the capacity method; it measures divergence for heuristic baselines.
